since_last: 74% of 100 AI names green; AI Chips & Compute leads +1.94%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: a broad bid, 74% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.77% · BTC +0.69% · Gold +0.07% · Nasdaq100 +1.40%. 74% of 100 AI names are green — a broad bid. AI Chips & Compute is doing the heavy lifting at +1.94%.

cards.headline: AI Chips & Compute leads, Applied AI: Industrial, Defense & Vertical lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Chips & Compute at +1.94%; weakest is Applied AI: Industrial, Defense & Vertical at -0.98%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: IBM is the standout at -23.66%
cards.body: Leaders: POWL +6.39%, BABA +6.02%, FTNT +4.70%, NVDA +4.10%, INTC +4.09%. Laggards: IBM -23.66%, SKHY -7.53%, ISRG -6.26%, CSCO -3.55%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +1.75% at $138.46
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +1.75% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
